general.condstr: You need at least 30% reputation with the Soromid.
general.description: This launcher is an extensively bioengineered colony of spaceflight-capable single celled organisms. On demand, a pheromone release with a complex biologically encoded target signature will signal the colony's 'defense response', and a pair of amoebae will be released to pursue a matching target. They will rupture on contact, releasing a soup of bioplasma to melt through the target's hull. The biological systems they use to sense and track their targets are difficult to jam through conventional methods.
